lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogname PowerShopE2E && npx wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogdescription E2ETesting && npx wp-env run cli -- wp rewrite structure /%postname%/ && npx wp-env run cli -- wp rewrite flush && npx wp-env run cli -- wp language core install zh_TW && npx wp-env run cli -- wp site switch-language zh_TW
